positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon and a whimsical constellation of glowing, interconnected stars forming an elegant animal silhouette (like a fox or deer). The scene should feature clean, thick line art combined with negative space, creating high contrast. Use a deep indigo and cosmic blue palette, with the stars emitting a soft, ethereal glow (luminescence). Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable, designed for direct transfer onto clothing fabric, emphasizing clean edges and graphic appeal. Minimalist, geometric, sacred geometry influences, symmetrical balance. Intricate detail in the starry elements, simple and bold silhouettes overall. Clean vector art aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low quality, photographic, realism, dirty, messy, gradient fade, poorly drawn, low detail
